content:
Hi everyone! 👋
Lately I've been thinking about my portfolio and wanted to create something unique and modern. So I came up with the concept of making it look like a chat with an AI.
I think it turned out pretty cool and different, but right now it feels a bit empty. Would love to hear what you think and ideas that can be realised.
What do you think, is this useful or is a default portfolio better?

  submitted by   /u/sh4manik
[link]   [comments]
